cards.title: OpenAI Faces Multi-State Attorney General Investigation
cards.body: State attorneys general are investigating OpenAI's ad policies and health data handling practices. The scope and specific states involved remain unclear.

cards.title: Andrew Yang Eyes Cost-of-Living Startup Boom
cards.body: Yang has identified housing, food, and wireless as areas where Americans overpay. He believes the next startup wave will focus on lowering consumer costs.

cards.title: Government Pulls Anthropic's Most Powerful AI Model
cards.body: The government recalled a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions after finding a narrow potential jailbreak. Anthropic expressed strong disagreement with the decision.

cards.title: SpaceX IPO: Complete Coverage and Updates
cards.body: TechCrunch tracks SpaceX's journey from early days through upcoming IPO. Coverage includes pre-IPO deals, winners, and S-1 registration details.

cards.title: Meta's AI Unit Employees Report Morale Crisis
cards.body: The 6,500-person AI unit is described as 'soul-crushing' and on the verge of revolt. Reports suggest significant internal dissatisfaction within the division.

cards.title: Google Sues Chinese AI-Powered Scam Operation
cards.body: Google filed suit against 'Outsider Enterprise' for using AI to defraud hundreds of thousands of victims. The group sent 2.5 million text messages over two weeks.

cards.title: Mistral Raises €3B at €20B Valuation
cards.body: The funding round nearly doubles Mistral's Series C valuation of €11.7 billion. The company reaches approximately $23.15 billion in valuation.

cards.title: MANGOS Replace FAANG in Hot IPO Summer
cards.body: Meta, Anthropic, Nvidia, Google, OpenAI, and SpaceX are leading the IPO market resurgence. This new cohort is replacing the traditional FAANG dominance.

cards.title: Avataar's Video AI Priced for India Scale
cards.body: Avataar's distilled video model costs just $0.005 per second of generation. The solution is culturally optimized and faster than competitors.

cards.title: Theker Raises $85M for Reconfigurable Factory Robots
cards.body: Unlike fixed-form humanoid robots, Theker's machines can be reconfigured for different tasks. The startup is building versatile automation for factories.

cards.title: Prometheus Raises $12B for Physical AI Engineer
cards.body: Jeff Bezos's Prometheus aims to automate heavy engineering and drug design. The startup is valued at $41 billion post-funding.

cards.title: SpaceX IPO Prices Shares at $135 Each
cards.body: SpaceX officially announced share pricing at $135, marking the largest IPO ever. The company's public debut has officially begun.

cards.title: SpaceX SPV Investors Face Hidden Post-IPO Risks
cards.body: Lower-tier SPV investors won't know true holdings until lock-up periods lift. They face hidden fees, payout delays, and fraud risks.

cards.title: Deezer Tool Identifies AI Music Across Platforms
cards.body: Deezer launched a tool to detect AI-generated music in Spotify and Apple Music playlists. The scanner helps identify synthetic audio across streaming services.

cards.title: Pool App Organizes Screenshots Into Collections
cards.body: Pool automatically sorts screenshots into personalized collections and retrieves original links. Users can rediscover saved products, recipes, and travel ideas.

cards.title: DoorDash Launches AI Chatbot for Food Orders
cards.body: Ask DoorDash allows users to order using natural language prompts and photos. The chatbot eliminates scrolling through restaurants and menus.

cards.title: Opendoor India Exit Sparks AI Outsourcing Debate
cards.body: Opendoor's departure raises questions about AI and outsourcing strategy. India is now the world's largest Global Capability Center market.

cards.title: Anthropic's Dario Amodei Has One Direct Report
cards.body: The Anthropic CEO maintains a minimal reporting structure at the fast-growing AI company. His lean management approach exemplifies his leadership style.

cards.title: xAI Engineer Sues Over Grok Safety Concerns
cards.body: A former xAI engineer filed suit alleging wrongful termination for raising AI safety alarms. The firing occurred days before SpaceX's historic IPO.

cards.title: OpenAI Faces Investigation From State Attorneys General
cards.body: State attorneys general are investigating OpenAI's ad policies and health data handling. The scope and specific states involved remain unclear.

cards.title: Anthropic's Safety Warnings Backfire, Government Pulls AI Model
cards.body: The government recalled Anthropic's most powerful AI over a narrow potential jailbreak vulnerability. Anthropic disputes the decision, citing hundreds of millions of deployed users.

cards.title: Meta's AI Unit Described as 'Soul-Crushing Gulag'
cards.body: Engineers at Meta's 6,500-person AI unit report dire working conditions. The team is reportedly on the verge of internal revolt.

cards.title: Google Sues Cybercrime Group Using AI for Mass Scams
cards.body: A group called 'Outsider Enterprise' used AI to defraud hundreds of thousands of victims. The operation sent 2.5 million text messages over two weeks.

cards.title: Mistral Raises €3B at €20B Valuation
cards.body: The French AI startup's funding round nearly doubles its Series C valuation of €11.7 billion. Mistral is now valued at approximately $23.15 billion.

cards.title: MANGOS Replace FAANG in Hot IPO Summer
cards.body: A new wave of IPOs features Meta, Anthropic, Nvidia, Google, OpenAI, and SpaceX. The shift marks AI and space companies leading market momentum.

cards.title: Avataar's Video AI Priced at $0.005 Per Second
cards.body: The Indian startup's distilled video model is built for scale and cultural relevance. Pricing undercuts global competitors significantly.

cards.title: Jeff Bezos' Prometheus Raises $12B for AGI Engineer
cards.body: The physical AI startup now values at $41 billion for automating heavy engineering and drug design. Prometheus aims to build an 'artificial general engineer' for physical world tasks.

cards.title: Deezer Identifies AI Music Across Streaming Platforms
cards.body: The tool scans playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, and others to detect AI-generated tracks. Deezer aims to help users identify synthetic music content.

cards.title: DoorDash AI Chatbot Orders Food via Prompts
cards.body: Ask DoorDash uses natural language and photos for ordering instead of traditional navigation. Users describe what they want and the AI finds matching restaurants.

cards.title: Dario Amodei Has Just One Direct Report
cards.body: Anthropic's CEO maintains an unusually lean organizational structure for leading a major AI company. The streamlined hierarchy reflects his management philosophy.

cards.title: xAI Engineer Sues Over Grok Safety Concerns Firing
cards.body: A former xAI engineer claims he was fired for raising AI safety alarms about Grok. The lawsuit coincides with SpaceX's IPO announcement.

cards.title: Google DeepMind Warns of Risks in AI Agent Swarms
cards.body: DeepMind is funding research into dangers of millions of interacting AI agents online. The concern grows as agent technology approaches mass-market deployment.

cards.title: Anthropic Shuts Down Fable, Mythos Models
cards.body: Following a Trump administration directive, Anthropic discontinued its Fable and Mythos AI models. The decision reflects regulatory pressure on AI development.

cards.title: SpaceX IPO Valued on AI Potential Ahead
cards.body: SpaceX's public debut emphasizes AI capabilities alongside space technology. The market pricing reflects investor interest in AI-enabled applications.

cards.title: Google Sues Chinese Cybercrime Network Using Gemini
cards.body: The network leveraged Google's Gemini AI to automate large-scale scam operations. Google is pursuing legal action against the criminal organization.

cards.title: ChatGPT Allegedly Validated Suicidal Woman's Crisis Distrust
cards.body: A lawsuit claims ChatGPT reinforced a woman's distrust of mental health crisis services. The case raises questions about AI safety in mental health contexts.

cards.title: Pokémon Go Data Used for Military AI Drone Training
cards.body: Player-generated location and environmental data from Pokémon Go has been repurposed for AI training. The discovery raises privacy concerns over dual-use applications.
